How's it going everybody? In this video I'm going to show you how to remove one of your contacts in Agile CRM from a campaign. So if somebody requests to no longer get those messages or they leave your challenge in the middle of it and you don't want to send those messages anymore, this is how you can remove them. Make sure you're responding to those requests if they ask to stop those messages or say they don't want to get them anymore. Make sure you remove them from it. So on the Agile CRM, go and log in if you need to, and we want to click contacts. It's right underneath the little house at the top left. Go and find the contact that you want to remove. You can use these arrows here to go through the different pages if you have more than one page. I'm going to go and click on this contact here, and it takes you right to the campaigns, and you see it says active campaigns. They're in my campaign right now, so I want to get them out of that campaign so they no longer get those automated messages. Let's go and hit this X right there. Are you sure you want to remove them? I'm going to hit yes, and they're no longer in the active campaign. They won't get those messages anymore. Hope you enjoyed this video, and hope you have a great rest of your day.
